meta.purpose: Incremental official-source audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press Lot96-100. This batch records a conservative search pass only; database.json and research-candidates.json are intentionally unchanged because no additional source-linked historical rows were confirmed to promotion standard in this pass.
sourcePriority: Official or high-trust result pages/PDFs only

preflight.duplicateBatchSearch: No open PR was found before this run. Main data/database.json was checked and Lot96-100 roster skeleton rows exist. Main data/database.json retains layoutTemplate v5.9.6_LOCK. No existing Lot96-100 run87 batch file was present on main before this branch.

processedAthletes.name: 竹内 謙太
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot96; sex, class, team, and declared best remain marked 要確認 in the skeleton. No additional high-trust historical result row was confirmed in this pass.

processedAthletes.name: 片山 遼
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot97; sex, class, team, and declared best remain marked 要確認 in the skeleton. No additional high-trust historical result row was confirmed in this pass.

processedAthletes.name: 矢崎 光康
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot98. The same Japanese name also appears as Lot70 in the roster skeleton, so this pass did not infer identity across lots or promote any name-only match.

processedAthletes.name: 広瀬 優太
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot99; sex, class, team, and declared best remain marked 要確認 in the skeleton. No additional high-trust historical result row was confirmed in this pass.

processedAthletes.name: 宮下 綾太
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot100; sex, class, team, and declared best remain marked 要確認 in the skeleton. No additional high-trust historical result row was confirmed in this pass.
searchedNames: ミヤシタ リョウタ

databaseUpdate.reason: No confirmed historical rows beyond the existing roster skeleton met the source-linking and identity standard in this small batch. The canonical DB was not rewritten.

candidateUpdate.reason: Search results did not produce useful but ambiguous athlete-history candidates worth preserving; no uncertain achievement was inferred.

sourceAudit.label: Repository main data/database.json
sourceAudit.usedFor: Confirmed that Lot96-100 roster skeleton rows exist and that histories are empty before this batch; confirmed v5.9.6_LOCK remains the layoutTemplate.

sourceAudit.label: GitHub open PR search
sourceAudit.usedFor: Checked that no open PR needed merging or conflict review before creating this safe audit branch.

sourceAudit.label: HPA official source family
sourceAudit.usedFor: Maintained source priority for Hokkaido official PDFs and checked exact-name HPA source context. No additional Lot96-100 historical rows were promoted from HPA in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: JPA official source family
sourceAudit.usedFor: Maintained national official-source priority and performed exact-name official-site sweeps. No additional Lot96-100 historical rows were promoted from JPA in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: Web search: official/high-trust Japanese name sweeps
sourceAudit.usedFor: No reliable confirmed row was found for Lot96-100 through Japanese name-based HPA/JPA/high-trust search strings in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: Web search: romanized Goodlift/IPF sweeps
sourceAudit.usedFor: Romanized searches were checked for Goodlift/IPF-style references. Generic false-positive results and unlinked namesakes were not preserved as candidates.

notes: No achievements, records, placements, or totals were invented or inferred.
Because no candidate-quality ambiguous results were found, data/research-candidates.json was left unchanged.
A4 print layout and v5.9.6_LOCK files were not modified.

矢崎 光康 appears at both Lot70 and Lot98 in the roster skeleton; this batch did not infer whether those entries represent the same athlete. Any future promotion must preserve lot-specific identity evidence.

This run completes a first conservative audit pass across the Lot1-100 roster batches previously handled in this sequence, but recurring research may continue only if deeper official PDF review is still desired.
